# Installation > `npm install --save @types/estree` # Summary This package contains type definitions for estree (https://github.com/estree/estree). # Details Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/estree. ### Additional Details * Last updated: Fri, 06 Jun 2025 00:04:33 GMT * Dependencies: none # Credits These definitions were written by [RReverser](https://github.com/RReverser).
